backend/main.mo: Motoko actor providing authenticated customer CRUD, payment tracking, user profiles, and access control using Map-based storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a WhatsApp message template update to the specific frontend file and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing roles of all major frontend files including components, hooks, utilities, and context.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variable definitions configuring light/dark color palettes using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the root React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling authentication, profile setup, theming, refresh context, and rendering the customer dashboard.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDashboar: Dashboard component displaying customer stats, search/filter controls, and actions including import, create, and delete-all customers.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFormDial: Dialog for creating or editing customers with validation, backend mutation handling, and auto-clearing of errors on refresh.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTable.ts: Displays a customer list with actions for editing, deleting, collecting payments, and sending WhatsApp messages. Manages related dialog state and handles validation and formatting.
frontend/src/components/ExcelImportDialo: Provides a dialog to upload and parse CSV files into customer records. Validates rows, displays errors, and submits create or update requests.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a simple footer with branding and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Shows the app header with theme toggle, refresh, user menu, and logout functionality. Uses Internet Identity to determine authentication state.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Displays the login screen with branding and an Internet Identity sign-in button. Highlights core app features with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/PaymentCollectio: Dialog for recording a payment for a customer, showing current balance and calculating updated balance. Submits payment mutations and resets state on close.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via a profile mutation. Shows a simple form inside a centered card.
frontend/src/components/StatsCards.tsx: Displays customer and payment statistics with currency formatting and includes a reset dialog for collected payments.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageD: Provides a dialog allowing users to edit and confirm WhatsApp messages before sending.
frontend/src/context/AppRefreshContext.t: Context handling full app data refresh by invalidating and refetching core queries with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, handling login, stored identity loading, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for user profiles, customers, and payment operations with mutations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables defining light and dark theme color tokens and layout settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and global styles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL and hash params, persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them, mainly for tokens and routing.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Offers utilities to normalize phone numbers, format outstanding balance messages, validate WhatsApp eligibility, and generate WhatsApp deep links.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: TailwindCSS config extending colors, animations, layout, and enabling plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Describes the full project state, features, and versions for a customer balance manager app on Internet Computer with RBAC, customer management, and WhatsApp integration.
